hero.title: Marquee Hire Across Hampshire, Surrey , sussex – Weddings, Parties & Events
hero.body:
Friendly, Family-Run Marquee Hire in Hampshire.
            Complete Marquees is a family-run company based in Havant, near Southampton and Portsmouth. We provide professional marquee hire and event solutions across Surrey, Hampshire & West Sussex.

service_cards.title: Stunning Wedding Marquee Hire in Hampshire, Surrey & West Sussex
service_cards.description:
Celebrate in style with wedding marquees in Hampshire & Surrey. Tailored designs, flooring, lighting, and furnishings included. Professional setup and removal ensure a seamless, unforgettable day.
                Wedding specialist Book now!

service_cards.title: Party Marquee Hire in Hampshire, Surrey & West Sussex
service_cards.description: Host the ultimate celebration with our party marquees in Hampshire, Surrey & West Sussex. Flexible sizes, weather-proof, fully customisable, with professional setup. Perfect for birthdays, anniversaries, garden parties, and family events.

service_cards.title: Event marquees in Hampshire, Surrey & West Sussex
service_cards.description: Host unforgettable events with our event marquees in Hampshire, Surrey & West Sussex. Flexible sizes, weather-proof, fully customisable, with professional setup and breakdown. Perfect for corporate events, parties, weddings, and family celebrations.

service_cards.title: special events in Hampshire, Surrey & West Sussex
service_cards.description: Make your special events in Hampshire, Surrey & West Sussex unforgettable. Fully customisable event marquees, flexible sizes, weather-proof, with professional setup and breakdown—perfect for weddings, parties, corporate gatherings, and family celebrations.
